name: FPV Flight-Control Lab
summary: Open FPV flight-controller hardware, a 75A 4-in-1 ESC design, INAV firmware experiments, and Blackbox-based PID/filter tuning tools.

projects.summary: Open FPV ESC hardware project with Gerbers, schematic PDF, PCB previews, DSHOT600 notes, and high-current review requests.
